stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
In case of failure of the TRU 2: (NB: all contactors not mentioned are assumed to remain open)

options.a: DC BUS 2 cannot be fed via DC BAT BUS.
options.b: DC BUS 2 can be fed by TRU 1 via DC BUS 1 and DC BAT BUS if C5.1, C7.1 and C7.4 are closed.
options.c: DC BUS 2 can be fed by TRU 1 if C3.1 and C3.2 are closed.
options.d: DC BUS 2 can be fed via DC ESS BUS if C5.3, C3.2 and C5.2 are closed.
